text: Currently don't know how to reproduce it. Two days ago I've upgraded system from stable/13-n246946-a2d0f28a8e69 to 13-n247000-5a67aaf1fa2c. And only now it's creashed under high server load. Possibly it some how related to recent changes in ULE. RACK is used only for nginx on the server.
